sanskrit:
मत्तः परतरं नान्यत्किञ्चिदस्ति धनञ्जय।
मयि सर्वमिदं प्रोतं सूत्रे मणिगणा इव॥
transliteration: mattaḥ parataraṃ nānyat kiñcid asti dhanañjaya | mayi sarvam idaṃ protaṃ sūtre maṇi-gaṇā iva ||
literal_meaning: Beyond Me, nothing higher exists, O Arjuna; all this is threaded on Me like pearls on a string.
contextual_meaning: Krishna asserts absolute ontological supremacy, offering Arjuna a single secure attachment to regulate all other attachments.
psychological_state: Provision of a non-contingent, omnipresent secure base that can contain fragmentation anxiety and narcissistic injury.
trigger_scenario: A client whose therapist says, 'No matter what you reveal, the therapeutic space can hold it all,' dissolving panic that memories are too much.
anchor_text: Rest your heart in the One who holds the universe together.
